task_updates.executor_notes: Staging verification is blocked by missing rollout state. Against the linked Supabase project, `to_regclass('public.asset_comments')`, `to_regclass('public.media_import_jobs')`, `to_regprocedure('internal.discord_promote_resources(boolean)')`, and `to_regclass('public.discord_messages_resource_op_idx')` all returned `NULL`, and the `supabase_migrations.schema_migrations` probe returned none of the required versions `20260423000000` through `20260424000000`. Because `media_import_jobs` does not exist on staging, the required seed row for the video/image smoke test could not be inserted, the importer could not be exercised against the intended schema, and none of the requested validations ran: no HLS population check, no Storage URL check, no junction-row verification, no immediate re-invocation idempotency check, no forced failure/backoff exercise, and no curl checks against rehosted URLs. Full-suite re-verification was rerun via `pytest --tb=no -q --no-header`; it still reports the same 7 pre-existing failures seen in earlier batches and no new smoke-test-specific regression signal.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: No. The smoke test did not run end-to-end because staging still lacks the required Discord-sync schema and migrations: `asset_comments`, `media_import_jobs`, `internal.discord_promote_resources(boolean)`, and `discord_messages_resource_op_idx` all probe as absent, so no seed job could be inserted and none of the video/image import, webhook, retry, or curl validations were executable.
